programs.title: Coral City
programs.desc: Adapt or perish in the coral streets as higher-than-normal temperatures make autumn cooling (and survival) more difficult. Shack up with a clownfish family and their sea anemone landlord, then see cleaner fish give manta rays a day at the spa.

director: Craig Meade, Alan Erson: Executive Producers, Siddharth Nambiar: Director

programs.title: Dogs with Extraordinary Jobs
programs.desc: Meet a golden retriever that assuages anxiety and helps heal PTSD, a shepherd mix who rescues mudslide survivors, a pair of spaniels who sniff out underground water leaks, and a group of teacher’s pets in the UK that assist children learning to read.

director: Hayley Smith, Caroline Hawkins, Clare Birks:Producers

programs.title: Dogs with Extraordinary Jobs
programs.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

director: Hayley Smith, Caroline Hawkins, Clare Birks:Producers

programs.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programs.desc: Watch a milestone moment when two students get their first forest time in years. And another pair of students are confined to the school’s clinic after an accident in the forest leaves Beni with a broken leg and Lala with a broken elbow.

programs.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programs.desc: The Emu is Australia’s biggest native bird and is the second largest bird in the world after the African ostrich: two meters tall, with an almost three metre running stride and totally flightless. This bird inhabits a topsy turvy world, where females call the shots, eggs are green and men do all the work to produce and raise tiny babies, known as Stripeys.

programs.title: Deep Dive North America
programs.desc: Marvel at North America’s natural wonders as Lizzie swims through astonishing coral reefs, digs for ancient fossils, and treks through jungles on tropical shores. Prowl with jaguars that stalk a Costa Rican beach and meet the planet’s biggest sharks.

director: Presenter: Lizzie Daly, Director: Mark Woodward, Executive Producer: Emma Ross
